headline: Meta vs. Netflix: One of These Stocks Will Double — and One Will Disappoint
summary: I’m of the view the stock market is becoming much more bifurcated. Stock pickers may outperform in such an environment, with investors seemingly paying closer attention to fundamentals than I’ve seen in some time. With that in mind, I thought I’d compare and contrast two of the top Magnificent 7 stocks, to determine which may ... Meta vs. Netflix: One of These Stocks Will Double — and One Will Disappoint

headline: Wells Fargo Initiates Netflix (NFLX) with Equal Weight Rating Amid Global Content Strategy
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) ranks among the best FAANG+ stocks to invest in right now. Evercore ISI reaffirmed an Outperform rating and a $115 price target for Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) on March 11, citing survey results from the United States and Japan. According to the firm, the poll results support Netflix’s efforts to enhance engagement, content […]
